channel.title: anan.zh.kg Blog
channel.description: Deep dives, references and cheatsheets for developers.

item.title: What is UUID v7
item.description: UUID v7 is the new time-sortable UUID standard. Learn why it matters.

item.title: Base64 Explained
item.description: What Base64 actually is, how it works, and what it is not.

item.title: JWT Structure: A Visual Guide
item.description: Decode any JWT. Understand the header, payload, and signature.

item.title: Cron Syntax Cheatsheet
item.description: Every cron pattern you will ever need.

item.title: JSON vs YAML: When to Use Which
item.description: Two formats, one job. Understand the tradeoffs.
